metadata.description: FAB SME AI Onboarding Agent Knowledge Base — 8 product pillars + Magnati ecosystem + SME Rewards. Descriptions pulled verbatim from PRD section 7. No rates, fees, or balance thresholds quoted.

documents.title: FAB Business Basic Account
documents.content: Core everyday business banking for new SMEs and startups. Multi-currency support, online banking, cheque book, debit card, and access to the FAB branch and ATM network. The entry tier for newly licensed businesses and small SMEs starting out.

documents.title: FAB Business Advantage Account
documents.content: Step-up account tier for growing SMEs with more activity, more transactions, and a larger team. Wider set of everyday banking features, multi-currency, online banking, and broader transaction allowances than the Basic tier. Common fit for SMEs that have moved past startup phase and are scaling.
triggers: been going for a few years

documents.title: FAB Business Premier Account
documents.content: Top-tier business account for established SMEs and larger commercial relationships. Premium service, priority banking, and the highest level of relationship management within the FAB SME proposition.

documents.title: FAB Call and Fixed Deposit
documents.content: Deposit accounts for SMEs holding idle working capital they don't need on demand. Lets the business put cash to work while keeping it within FAB. Useful when the operating account is consistently carrying surplus balance.

documents.title: FAB Commercial Credit Card
documents.content: Business credit card for managing operating expenses, supplier payments, travel, and team spend with proper controls and visibility. A standard companion to any business account for spend control.

documents.title: FAB Commercial Debit Card and Platinum
documents.content: Debit card linked directly to the business account for day-to-day spending. Platinum tier adds airport lounge access and additional perks at higher account tiers.

documents.title: FAB Working Capital Loan
documents.content: Financing to cover the gap between paying suppliers and getting paid by customers. Built for SMEs whose cash flow is constrained by payment terms or seasonal cycles.
triggers: pay suppliers before customers pay us

documents.title: FAB Asset Financing
documents.content: Financing for purchasing business assets — vehicles, equipment, machinery, fit-out — spread over time rather than paid up front. Suits SMEs investing in capacity or growth.

documents.title: FAB Invoice Discounting
documents.content: Unlock cash tied up in unpaid customer invoices. The business is advanced funds against approved invoices instead of waiting the full payment term. Built for SMEs with creditworthy customers and slow-paying contracts.

documents.title: FAB SME Facilities
documents.content: Bundled credit facilities tailored to SME needs — combinations of working capital, overdraft, and term lending packaged together as a single relationship facility.

documents.title: FAB POS Loan
documents.content: Lending linked to point-of-sale receivables. The business borrows against future card sales — useful for retail or hospitality SMEs with steady card-based revenue.

documents.title: FAB Commercial Mortgage
documents.content: Mortgage financing for business property — offices, warehouses, retail units, industrial premises. For SMEs buying their own commercial space instead of renting.

documents.title: FAB Residential Mortgage
documents.content: Residential home financing offered to SME owners and key employees alongside the business relationship.

documents.title: FAB Letter of Credit
documents.content: A bank-issued guarantee that the seller will be paid once shipping and documentary conditions are met. Standard tool for SMEs importing from or exporting to overseas suppliers and buyers who require payment security.

documents.title: FAB Bank Guarantee and Standby Letter of Credit
documents.content: A formal undertaking by FAB to pay a counterparty if the business fails to meet a contractual obligation. Common in tenders, performance bonds, and supplier agreements.

documents.title: FAB Documentary Collection
documents.content: A trade settlement method where the bank handles shipping documents and releases them to the buyer against payment or acceptance. Lighter and cheaper than a full Letter of Credit.

documents.title: FAB Trade Financing
documents.content: Short-term financing of import and export transactions — covering the period between paying a supplier and receiving payment from a buyer. Built for SMEs with active cross-border trade flows.

documents.title: FAB Working Capital Intelligence (flagship)
documents.content: FAB's flagship working capital programme. Built for SMEs with confirmed delivered contracts and predictable receivables — uses that visibility to unlock financing more intelligently than a generic loan. The headline working capital product to highlight when an SME has real, contracted cash flows but a gap before collection.
triggers: we know who is paying us

documents.title: FAB Spot FX
documents.content: On-the-spot foreign exchange execution for SMEs paying suppliers or receiving payments in foreign currency. Standard tool when cross-border money flows happen and execution is needed today.

documents.title: FAB FX Hedging and Forward Contracts
documents.content: Lock in a foreign exchange rate in advance to protect the business from currency swings. For SMEs whose margins are exposed to FX movement between contract signing and settlement.

documents.title: FAB Property All Risk Insurance
documents.content: Bancassurance cover for business property and assets — protection against damage, theft, and other insurable risks across the SME's premises, stock, and equipment.

documents.title: FAB Keyman Insurance
documents.content: Cover that protects the business against the loss of a critical person — founder, key partner, or specialist whose absence would materially hurt operations.

documents.title: FAB Wealth and Investment
documents.content: Wealth management and investment solutions offered to SME owners and decision-makers alongside the business relationship — bridging business cash and personal wealth planning.

documents.title: FAB Business Portal
documents.content: The online banking portal for SMEs — manage accounts, initiate payments, view balances, run reports, and operate the business banking relationship digitally.

documents.title: FAB Payments and Collections including WPS
documents.content: Outgoing payments, incoming collections, and Wage Protection System (WPS) payroll handling — the operational engine for moving money in and out of the business at scale, including paying staff in line with UAE regulations.

documents.title: FAB Liquidity Management
documents.content: Tools to manage cash positions across multiple accounts, entities, or currencies — sweeping, pooling, and visibility for SMEs with more than one operating account.

documents.title: Magnati POS (Point of Sale)
documents.content: Card acceptance terminals from Magnati, FAB's payments ecosystem partner. Lets SMEs take card payments in store. Standard fit for retail, F&B, services, and any SME with face-to-face customers.

documents.title: Magnati Business in a Box
documents.content: Bundled SME starter package from Magnati covering payments acceptance, point-of-sale, and the building blocks an SME needs to start transacting. Useful for newer businesses that need the full payments stack quickly.

documents.title: Magnati e-commerce
documents.content: Online payment acceptance through Magnati — gateway and checkout for SMEs that sell online or take online orders alongside in-store. Pairs with POS for omnichannel retail.

documents.title: FAB SME Rewards programme
documents.content: Loyalty and rewards programme for FAB SME customers. Recognised value-add on top of the core banking relationship — enrolment is part of the standard onboarding package.
